data.title: Add Sub-Agent Delegation section to using-dso SKILL.md and HOOK-INJECTION.md (GREEN)
data.description:
## What

Add the Sub-Agent Delegation section with a Red Flags table (Thought/Reality columns) to `plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md`. Update `plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/HOOK-INJECTION.md` with matching injection content. Remove the RED marker from `.test-index`. All 5 structural tests in `test-using-dso-delegation.sh` must pass after this task.

## Why

Satisfies story 6622-3799 done definitions: provides startup-hook guidance that shapes Claude toward sub-agent delegation where appropriate (sequential reads, parallel edits, external review).

## testing_mode: GREEN

## Files to Modify
- `plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md` (ADD section — Sub-Agent Delegation with Red Flags table)
- `plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/HOOK-INJECTION.md` (ADD delegation guidance for injection)
- `.test-index` (REMOVE RED marker added in task 3c35-dc12)

## Content Requirements

### SKILL.md — Sub-Agent Delegation section (≤60 rendered lines)

Must contain:
- `## Sub-Agent Delegation` heading
- Red Flags table with Thought/Reality columns covering these 3 patterns:
  1. Sequential multi-file reads (10+ files): Thought: 'I'll read these files one by one' → Reality: Parallelize with Agent/Explore for 10+ files
  2. Serial independent file edits: Thought: 'I'll edit each file in sequence' → Reality: Independent edits can be parallelized
  3. Inline self-review: Thought: 'I'll review my own changes' → Reality: Use /dso:review for objective review
- Scope limitation note: sub-agents dispatched by this guidance must NOT re-apply startup hook delegation guidance to spawn further sub-agents (prevents recursive spawning)
- Must not name specific reviewer agents (e.g., do not say 'use dso:code-reviewer-deep-arch')
- Must not conflict with CLAUDE.md Never-Do rules (note compatibility with rule 4: max sub-agents cap, rule 5: commit before new batch — cross-reference or note that CLAUDE.md governs limits)

### HOOK-INJECTION.md — delegation guidance

Must contain matching sub-agent delegation guidance suitable for startup hook injection: Red Flags table or summary plus the scope limitation note.

## TDD Requirement

All 5 tests in `tests/skills/test-using-dso-delegation.sh` must pass after this task:
- `test_skill_md_has_delegation_section` GREEN
- `test_skill_md_has_three_red_flag_patterns` GREEN
- `test_skill_md_delegation_section_line_count` GREEN
- `test_skill_md_has_recursive_scope_note` GREEN
- `test_hook_md_has_delegation_guidance` GREEN

## Acceptance Criteria

### Universal
- Verify: `bash tests/skills/test-using-dso-delegation.sh` (exits 0)
- Verify: `bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci 2>&1 | grep -v SKIP | tail -5`

### Task-Specific
- Verify: `grep -q '## Sub-Agent Delegation' plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md`
- Verify: `grep -qE 'sequential.*multi.file|multi.file.*read|10\+.*file' plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md`
- Verify: `grep -qE 'serial.*independent|independent.*edit' plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md`
- Verify: `grep -qE 'inline.*self.review|self.review' plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md`
- Verify: `grep -qiE 'recursive|re.spawn|spawn.*further|not.*spawn|sub-agent.*not' plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/SKILL.md`
- Verify: `grep -q 'Sub-Agent Delegation\|sub-agent delegation\|delegation' plugins/dso/skills/using-dso/HOOK-INJECTION.md`
- Verify: `! grep -q 'using-dso/SKILL.md.*test-using-dso-delegation' .test-index` (RED marker removed)
